lines: Office of the Foreign Influence Commissioner of Canada

We are an independent office that administers a public registry of foreign influence activities in Canada and ensures compliance with the registration requirements. The registry increases public transparency around foreign influence activities and helps ensure the integrity of our democracy.
Find out if you need to register
The Office will open on August 4, 2026. You can’t register yet, but you can learn how to prepare in advance. If you have questions, contact the Commissioner's office.
